fmkorea.html_sample:
<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
<title>에펨코리아 보안 시스템</title>

<style type="text/css">
    .main_t {height: 100%; width: 100%; border: 0;}
    .main_t td {text-align: center;}
    .main_t td.info {font-size: 25px; height: 100%; text-align: center; vertical-align: top; padding-top: 2em;}
    .main_t td.info b {font-size: 28px;}
    .sign { color: #ccc; margin-top: 5em;}
    .sign a { color: #ccc; }

    @media only screen and (max-width: 768px) {
        .main_t td.info {font-size: 20px;}
        .main_t td.info b {font-size: 25px;}
    }
</style>
